content:
I am not German, but I'll attempt to answer some of your questions.

First, it appears that you have never posted to this forum, so it is unclear with whom you were corresponding. On German users: there are many. See this page: https://stats.thunderbird.net/#platlang On release channels:: the ESR is more stable, as it is updated with new features annually. The portable version is released only in the monthly version, so that would be 149 On developer toolbox: that is for users. No, Thunderbird employees or support personnel cannot see your mail. Thunderbird is 100% private to the user. On archive versions: I think what you are seeing are examples of setting up annual archives

There is a German support forum. I am unsure of the URL, but this may be it: 

https://www.thunderbird-mail.de/forum/board/36-hilfe-zu-e-mail-und-allgemeines-arbeiten/

I hope my responses have been useful.
creator: davidsk
